# Get started with AuthKit

## Use the AI Installer & CLI

Automatically integrate WorkOS into your app with one command. The [AI Installer & CLI](https://workos.com/docs/authkit/cli-installer) also manages resources, provisions environments, and equips your coding agents with WorkOS knowledge.

```bash title="AI Installer & CLI"
npx workos@latest
```

## Or install using your preferred stack

Follow a framework-specific guide to integrate AuthKit manually.
